app_settings.title: App Settings
app_settings.subtitle: Configure your app preferences and behavior

use_http2.label: Use HTTP/2
use_http2.hint: Enable HTTP/2 protocol for better performance

bearer_token.label: Bearer Token
bearer_token.hint: This token will be stored securely

settings.title: Conversation Compaction
settings.subtitle: Configure automatic context compaction behavior
settings.auto_enabled_hint: Automatically compact older context when thresholds are met
settings.usage_threshold_hint: Compact when context usage reaches this percentage
settings.remaining_threshold_hint: Compact when remaining tokens fall below this value
settings.reset_error: Failed to reset settings. Please try again.
settings.save_error: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

validation.usage_range: Usage threshold must be between 5 and 100
validation.remaining_positive: Remaining token threshold must be greater than 0
validation.remaining_below_limit: Remaining token threshold must be below the model context limit
validation.settings_invalid: Please enter valid numeric values for all fields

manual.disabled_tooltip_busy: Cannot compact while conversation is busy
manual.disabled_tooltip_unsafe: Cannot compact due to pending tool approvals

errors.compaction_failed: Compaction failed. Your conversation is still intact.
errors.compaction_unsafe: Compaction is not safe while tools are pending approval.
errors.compaction_unavailable: Compaction is not available for this conversation.
errors.context_overflow_retry_failed: Context overflow occurred and recovery compaction failed. Please try compacting manually.
errors.auto_blocked: Automatic compaction is required but failed. Assistant continuation is blocked. Try compacting manually.
errors.settings_invalid: Invalid compaction settings. Please check your values.

workspace_management.title: Manage Workspaces
workspace_management.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
workspace_management.delete_active_error: Cannot delete the active workspace. Switch to another workspace first.
workspace_management.delete_last_error: Cannot delete the last remaining workspace.
workspace_management.name_too_short_error: Workspace name must be at least {min} characters
workspace_management.name_too_long_error: Workspace name must be at most {max} characters
workspace_management.switch_error: Failed to switch workspace. Please try again.
workspace_management.load_error: Failed to load workspaces. Please try again.
workspace_management.error_duplicate: A workspace with this name already exists
workspace_management.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
